'''fazara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabakha|sabakha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabakha|sabakha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fazara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzæræth|fæzæræth]] || [[word:fæzæræj|fæzæræj]] || [[word:fæzæræsh|fæzæræsh]] || [[word:fæzæræ|fæzæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazazarath|fazazarath]] || [[word:fazazaraj|fazazaraj]] || [[word:fazazarash|fazazarash]] || [[word:fazazara|fazazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazarath|fazarath]] || [[word:fazaraj|fazaraj]] || [[word:fazarash|fazarash]] || [[word:fazara|fazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazafrath|fazafrath]] || [[word:fazafraj|fazafraj]] || [[word:fazafrash|fazafrash]] || [[word:fazafraf|fazafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazaratha|fazaratha]] || [[word:fazaraja|fazaraja]] || [[word:fazarasha|fazarasha]] || [[word:fazaraka|fazaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazarath|fazarath]] || [[word:fazaraj|fazaraj]] || [[word:fazarash|fazarash]] || [[word:fazara|fazara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazarathal|fazarathal]] || [[word:fazarajal|fazarajal]] || [[word:fazarashal|fazarashal]] || [[word:fazarakal|fazarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazarathatha|fazarathatha]] || [[word:fazarajaja|fazarajaja]] || [[word:fazarashasha|fazarashasha]] || [[word:fazaraka|fazaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazarathan|fazarathan]] || [[word:fazarajan|fazarajan]] || [[word:fazarashan|fazarashan]] || [[word:fazarakan|fazarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazarathaoro|fazarathaoro]] || [[word:fazarajaoro|fazarajaoro]] || [[word:fazarashaoro|fazarashaoro]] || [[word:fazarakaoro|fazarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
